zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Adam Mure Of Rowallan於大約1330年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾時，他的父親Adam Mure 2nd Baron of Rowallan36歲，母親Lady Janet Muir Heiress of Pokellie36歲。他於1380年之前與Lady Janet de Danielstoun結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1399年在他的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.Hadinden, Brasted, Kent, England: 英国英格兰肯特布拉斯泰德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Adam Mure Of Rowallan于大约1330年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾时，他的父亲Adam Mure 2nd Baron of Rowallan36岁，母亲Lady Janet Muir Heiress of Pokellie36岁。他于1380年之前与Lady Janet de Danielstoun结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1399年在他的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Mure
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Old French muer ‘mewer’, i.e. someone who tended to hawks in the cages in which they were kept while moulting. Compare Mew .

variants.name: Mura
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Akio, Hideo, Masao, Nanako, Tsutomu, Yoshi.  French Alphonse, Amie, Henri.
German: altered form of some similar (like-sounding) German or perhaps French surname. It is also common in France (Alsace), where it was first recorded in the form Morrau, later Murra(w).
Italian (southern Sardinia): topographic name or nickname from Sardinian mura ‘mulberry’ or ‘blackberry’.

variants.name: Muir
meanings: Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived on a moor, from Older Scots muir ‘moor’ (an expanse of bare, wild upland country). There has been some confusion with Mure .

variants.name: Morea
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Saverio, Domenic, Ferdinando, Rocco.  Spanish Manuel, Carlos, Cesar, Elvira, Jesus, Mauricio.

Italian (Apulia): from the personal name Morea, originally a habitational name from Morea, the medieval name of the Greek region of Peloponnese, named as the land of mulberry trees, from mōrea ‘mulberry’.
Spanish and Catalan: habitational name from any of the places called Morea, in Badajoz, Navarre, and Lleida provinces.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Adam Mure Of Rowallan was born about 1330, in Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Adam Mure 2nd Baron of Rowallan, was 36 and his mother, Lady Janet Muir Heiress of Pokellie, was 36. He married Lady Janet de Danielstoun before 1380. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1399, in his hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Adam Mure Of Rowallan est né environ 1330, à Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Adam Mure 2nd Baron of Rowallan, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Lady Janet Muir Heiress of Pokellie, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Lady Janet de Danielstoun avant 1380. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1399, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Adam Mure Of Rowallan um 1330 in Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam Mure 2nd Baron of Rowallan 36 und seine Mutter Lady Janet Muir Heiress of Pokellie 36. Er hat vor 1380 Lady Janet de Danielstoun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1399 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Adam Mure Of Rowallan è nato il circa 1330 nel Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Adam Mure 2nd Baron of Rowallan, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Lady Janet Muir Heiress of Pokellie, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Lady Janet de Danielstoun prima del 1380. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1399, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Adam Mure Of Rowallanが約1330年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Adam Mure 2nd Baron of Rowallanは36歳，母Lady Janet Muir Heiress of Pokellieは36歳であった。1380年以前にLady Janet de Danielstounと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1399年に故郷で70歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Adam Mure Of Rowallan(이)가 대략 1330년 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam Mure 2nd Baron of Rowallan(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Janet Muir Heiress of Pokellie(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1380년 이전 Lady Janet de Danielstoun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1399년 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Adam Mure Of Rowallan nasceu aproximadamente 1330, em Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Adam Mure 2nd Baron of Rowallan, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Lady Janet Muir Heiress of Pokellie, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Janet de Danielstoun antes 1380. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1399, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Adam Mure Of Rowallan родился около 1330 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Adam Mure 2nd Baron of Rowallan было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Janet Muir Heiress of Pokellie, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Janet de Danielstoun перед 1380 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1399 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Adam Mure Of Rowallan nació aproximadamente 1330, en Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Adam Mure 2nd Baron of Rowallan, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Lady Janet Muir Heiress of Pokellie, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Lady Janet de Danielstoun antes de 1380. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1399, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
